name: Advance America
description_short: Fort Mill, SC's Advance America at 3150 US-21 #114 offers quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
Located at 3150 US-21 #114 in Fort Mill, SC, this Advance America storefront is a standalone financial services location serving the local community. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5:30 PM, with Saturday hours from 9 AM to noon, and is closed on Sundays, making it convenient for working professionals in Fort Mill to visit after hours.

This Fort Mill location specializes in payday loans and title loans, offering fast funding options for short-term financial needs. You can reach the branch directly at 803-547-9998 to discuss loan options, get pricing information, or ask about current eligibility requirements and documentation needed for your application.

If you live or work in Fort Mill, SC and need quick cash, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and a bank account for direct deposit. Advance America processes applications efficiently, with many loans funded the same day you apply.
pros: Same-day funding available for loans up to $1,000
Loan amounts up to $25,000 for title loans based on vehicle value
Extended store hours including Saturday morning (9am opening) and weekday evenings (until 6pm)
Bilingual staff available (Spanish language support mentioned)
Multiple loan product options (payday, installment, title) allowing flexibility based on borrowing need
High customer satisfaction rating: 4.9/5 stars from 125,448 Google reviews
Online application option available in addition to in-store applications
Western Union money transfer services available at store location
cons: APR rates and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website, suggesting potentially high fees
Title loans put vehicle ownership at risk if borrower defaults
Installment loans capped at $1,000 ($500 for payday loans) may be insufficient for larger emergencies
Requires checking account to qualify, excluding unbanked consumers
No mention of credit-building features or financial counseling to help escape debt cycles
best_for: Employed individuals with immediate cash needs between paychecks who have checking accounts
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($2,000+) and willing to use car title as collateral
Consumers requiring same-day or next-day cash access without credit checks
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual loan services
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with checking accounts who need emergency cash within days and are comfortable with short repayment terms or vehicle-backed collateral. The main caveat is that these products typically carry high APRs and short payoff periods that can create debt cycles; borrowers should carefully review all fees and terms before applying, and only use title loans if they can afford to lose vehicle access.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000 with extended repayment periods)
Title loans ($2,000-$25,000 using vehicle as collateral)
Store locations with extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 3150 US-21, Fort Mill, SC. Same-day payday and title loans available.
